title: Tsalmown #6756
definition:
Zalmon = "shady"

 n pr m
 1) an Ahohite, one of David's mighty warriors

 n pr loc
 2) a wooded hill in Samaria near Shechem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zalmon = "shady"

 n pr m
 1) an Ahohite, one of David's mighty warriors

 n pr loc
 2) a wooded hill in Samaria near Shechem

    NASB:  a mountain near Shechem, also perh. a snowcapped mountain of unc. location
